action_type.description: Canonical action type. Deprecated aliases remain allowed for backward compatibility.

eval_stage.description: Evaluation-stage label used to decide whether an action contributes to the primary preprocessing score.

equivalence_group.description: Optional task-local group id for mutually exclusive alternative actions. Actions with the same equivalence_group are scored with OR semantics rather than as independent gold units.

must_follow_action_ids.description: Optional ordered-output dependency metadata. Every listed golden action id must already appear in testcase pre_actions or earlier in the output sequence before this action is counted as valid.

invalidates_action_ids.description: Optional ordered-output invalidation metadata. If this action appears in testcase pre_actions or earlier in the output sequence, later actions with these ids are invalid.
